Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x5D1E "SOCCERPINBALL-5D1E" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Soccer Pinball.prg"
Metadata.Notes: As the original game is frozen, the breakpoint to use for dumping is actually $5D3C.
